name: Canary Controller
description: Automated canary promotion and rollback controller that follows the custodian pattern with async loop and periodic evaluation. Compares canary vs stable per-target metrics and automatically promotes or rolls back based on error rate and latency thresholds.

types.name: CanaryLifecycle
types.description: Protocol for lifecycle actions the canary controller can invoke

types.name: CanaryController

fields.name: _adapter
fields.description: Adapter providing target metrics and routing configuration

fields.name: _node_name
fields.description: Name of the node being controlled

fields.name: _latency_threshold
fields.description: Maximum acceptable p99 latency in milliseconds

fields.name: _min_requests
fields.description: Minimum requests required before evaluating canary

fields.name: _running
fields.description: Whether the controller loop is running

types.description: Automated canary promotion/rollback controller. Manages async evaluation loop, metric comparison, and routing updates.

functions.name: CanaryLifecycle.set_routing
functions.description: Protocol method to update routing configuration for a node

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Name of the node to update

postconditions: Routing configuration is updated for the specified node

functions.name: CanaryController.__init__
functions.description: Initialize a CanaryController with adapter, node name, lifecycle handler, and thresholds. Sets up internal state including running=False and outcome=empty string.

inputs.name: adapter
inputs.description: Adapter providing metrics and routing info

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Name of the node to control

inputs.name: error_threshold
inputs.description: Maximum error rate percentage before rollback

inputs.name: latency_threshold
inputs.description: Maximum p99 latency in ms before rollback

postconditions: _promote_steps is a list copy of promote_steps or DEFAULT_PROMOTE_STEPS

functions.name: CanaryController.outcome
functions.description: Property getter that returns the final outcome of the canary evaluation

functions.name: CanaryController.is_running
functions.description: Property getter that returns whether the controller evaluation loop is currently running

functions.name: CanaryController.run
functions.description: Main async evaluation loop. Sets running flag to True, logs start, sleeps for eval_interval between evaluations, calls _evaluate, stops when _running becomes False, and logs outcome.
postconditions: Logs controller start and stop messages

structured_side_effects.description: Sets _running to True at start, checks it throughout loop
Logs start and stop info messages

functions.name: CanaryController.stop
functions.description: Stops the evaluation loop by setting the _running flag to False

functions.name: CanaryController._evaluate
functions.description: Compare canary vs stable metrics. Returns early if no canary metrics or insufficient requests. Checks error rate and p99 latency against thresholds; calls _rollback if exceeded. Otherwise calls _promote.
postconditions: If canary metrics missing or insufficient requests: returns early

structured_side_effects.description: Logs debug messages for skipped evaluations, warnings for rollbacks

functions.name: CanaryController._get_current_canary_weight
functions.description: Get current canary weight from the adapter's routing config. Returns 0 if routing is None or canary target not found.
postconditions: Returns weight of canary target if found
Returns 0 if routing is None or canary target not found

functions.name: CanaryController._promote
functions.description: Advance canary to the next weight step. Gets current weight, finds next step in promote_steps list. If no next step, marks as promoted and stops. Otherwise creates new RoutingConfig with updated weights and calls lifecycle.set_routing. If weight reaches 100, marks as promoted and stops.
postconditions: If routing is None: returns early
If stable or canary target missing: logs error and returns
If next step found: calls lifecycle.set_routing with new weights

structured_side_effects.description: May set _outcome to 'promoted' and _running to False
Logs promotion info messages and error messages

functions.name: CanaryController._rollback
functions.description: Revert to 100% stable traffic. Sets outcome to 'rolled_back' and running to False. If routing config available, creates new RoutingConfig with stable at 100% weight and canary at 0%, then calls lifecycle.set_routing.
postconditions: If routing available and stable target found: calls lifecycle.set_routing with 100% stable
If stable target not found: logs error

structured_side_effects.description: Logs rollback info message or error message
Calls lifecycle.set_routing to set 100% stable traffic

invariants: _running is True only during active evaluation loop
Promotion only occurs when canary metrics exist and requests >= min_requests
Rollback sets canary weight to 0 and stable weight to 100
Promotion advances to next step in _promote_steps list where step > current_weight
